$comment: THE ACTION VOCABULARY — the finite set of things a combat unit DOES. This is what tells the generator WHICH animations to make per character, and what the combat engine selects from at runtime. Every action maps to a PixelLab template (preferred) or a custom v3 action_description, plus how many of the 8 facings it needs. Generate P0 first; P1/P2 as the roster matures. dirs: 8 = all facings, 4 = cardinals (N/E/S/W), 1 = south only.

playback.$comment: OWNER DECISION: default animation playback = 6 fps. Per-action overrides allowed (reactions can be snappier). Challenge #5: each imported animation records frameCount + triggerFrame (the frame that spawns the projectile / applies the hit). Rule: a value beyond the clip length clamps to the FINAL frame.

triggerFrame.$comment: which frame the projectile/hit fires on, per action. cast/ranged = late (on discharge); throw = mid-late; melee = mid. Owner-tuned: Surge blast fires on its FINAL frame (set 8 → clamped to last of 6).

actions.custom: hovering in the air, gentle bob, feet off ground
actions.$note: OWNER REQUIRED: flight is a two-part set — hover + fly_move must BOTH exist for any flying unit.

actions.custom: flying forward through the air, body leaning, arms ahead
actions.$note: OWNER REQUIRED: forward flight; pairs with fly_hover.

powerAnimationClasses.$comment: Auto-pick a cast animation by power type when a hero has powers, so new powers reuse art.

beam.custom: extending an arm, firing a directed energy beam

aura.custom: in-place gesture, radiant aura at feet
